# Third-Party Licenses

NexUSB bundles the following third-party tools, unmodified, from the
Ubuntu/Debian archive. Each tool keeps its own license; click a tool's
folder (or the link below) to view its authoritative upstream license.
No license text is copied here — these point at the real upstream source.

| Tool | License | Upstream license |
|------|---------|------------------|
| [ClamAV](clamav/) | GPL-2.0-only | [link](https://github.com/Cisco-Talos/clamav/blob/main/COPYING.txt) |
| [chkrootkit](chkrootkit/) | BSD-2-Clause | [link](https://www.chkrootkit.org/) |
| [TestDisk / PhotoRec](testdisk/) | GPL-2.0-or-later | [link](https://github.com/cgsecurity/testdisk/blob/master/COPYING) |
| [GNU ddrescue](ddrescue/) | GPL-3.0-or-later | [link](https://www.gnu.org/software/ddrescue/) |
| [GParted](gparted/) | GPL-2.0-or-later | [link](https://gitlab.gnome.org/GNOME/gparted/-/blob/master/COPYING) |
| [util-linux (fdisk)](util-linux/) | GPL-2.0-or-later (mixed) | [link](https://github.com/util-linux/util-linux/blob/master/README.licensing) |
| [GNU parted](parted/) | GPL-3.0-or-later | [link](https://git.savannah.gnu.org/cgit/parted.git/tree/COPYING) |
| [smartmontools](smartmontools/) | GPL-2.0-or-later | [link](https://github.com/smartmontools/smartmontools/blob/master/COPYING) |
| [Nmap](nmap/) | NPSL (GPL-2.0-derived) | [link](https://github.com/nmap/nmap/blob/master/LICENSE) |
| [netcat (OpenBSD)](netcat-openbsd/) | BSD-3-Clause | [link](https://salsa.debian.org/debian/netcat-openbsd) |
| [tcpdump / libpcap](tcpdump/) | BSD-3-Clause | [link](https://github.com/the-tcpdump-group/tcpdump/blob/master/LICENSE) |
| [OpenSSH](openssh/) | BSD-style (OpenSSH) | [link](https://github.com/openssh/openssh-portable/blob/master/LICENCE) |
| [Remmina](remmina/) | GPL-2.0-or-later | [link](https://gitlab.com/Remmina/Remmina/-/blob/master/LICENSE) |
| [TigerVNC](tigervnc/) | GPL-2.0-only | [link](https://github.com/TigerVNC/tigervnc/blob/master/LICENCE.TXT) |
| [xrdp](xrdp/) | Apache-2.0 | [link](https://github.com/neutrinolabs/xrdp/blob/devel/COPYING) |
| [Openbox](openbox/) | GPL-2.0-only | [link](http://openbox.org/wiki/Help:Contents) |
| [LXDM](lxdm/) | GPL-3.0-only | [link](https://github.com/lxde/lxdm/blob/master/COPYING) |
| [LXTerminal](lxterminal/) | GPL-2.0-or-later | [link](https://github.com/lxde/lxterminal/blob/master/COPYING) |
| [PCManFM](pcmanfm/) | GPL-2.0-or-later | [link](https://github.com/lxde/pcmanfm/blob/master/COPYING) |
| [Mozilla Firefox](firefox/) | MPL-2.0 | [link](https://www.mozilla.org/en-US/MPL/2.0/) |
| [GNU Midnight Commander](mc/) | GPL-3.0-only | [link](https://github.com/MidnightCommander/mc/blob/master/COPYING) |
| [GNU nano](nano/) | GPL-3.0-or-later | [link](https://git.savannah.gnu.org/cgit/nano.git/tree/COPYING) |
| [htop](htop/) | GPL-2.0-or-later | [link](https://github.com/htop-dev/htop/blob/main/COPYING) |
| [Vim](vim/) | Vim (charityware, GPL-compatible) | [link](https://github.com/vim/vim/blob/master/LICENSE) |
| [PyGObject (python3-gi)](pygobject/) | LGPL-2.1-or-later | [link](https://gitlab.gnome.org/GNOME/pygobject/-/blob/master/COPYING) |
| [GTK 3](gtk3/) | LGPL-2.1-or-later | [link](https://gitlab.gnome.org/GNOME/gtk/-/blob/main/COPYING) |
| [NetworkManager](network-manager/) | GPL-2.0-or-later | [link](https://gitlab.freedesktop.org/NetworkManager/NetworkManager/-/blob/main/COPYING) |
| [dialog](dialog/) | LGPL-2.1-only | [link](https://invisible-island.net/dialog/) |
| [Papirus icon theme](papirus-icon-theme/) | GPL-3.0-only | [link](https://github.com/PapirusDevelopmentTeam/papirus-icon-theme/blob/master/LICENSE) |
| [DejaVu fonts](fonts-dejavu/) | Bitstream Vera + public domain | [link](https://github.com/dejavu-fonts/dejavu-fonts/blob/master/LICENSE) |
| [Liberation fonts](fonts-liberation/) | SIL OFL-1.1 | [link](https://github.com/liberationfonts/liberation-fonts/blob/main/LICENSE) |
| [ImageMagick](imagemagick/) | ImageMagick License (Apache-2.0-style) | [link](https://github.com/ImageMagick/ImageMagick/blob/main/LICENSE) |
| [GNU Wget](wget/) | GPL-3.0-or-later | [link](https://git.savannah.gnu.org/cgit/wget.git/tree/COPYING) |
